name: @akaoio/zen
description: A realtime, decentralized, offline-first, graph data synchronization engine.

scripts.debug: node --prof-process --preprocess -j isolate*.log > v8data.json && rm isolate*.log && echo 'drag & drop ./v8data.json into https://mapbox.github.io/flamebearer/'
scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const drop = ['tmp','radata','data','radatatest','data.json']; for (const d of drop) { fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true}); } for (const name of fs.readdirSync('.')) { if (name.startsWith('radatatest-') || name.startsWith('radata-')) { fs.rmSync(name,{recursive:true,force:true}); } }"
scripts.test: npm run clean && echo 'Did you run PANIC holy-grail, 1~X, on-recover, etc.?' && mocha --exit test/abc.js test/rad/rad.js test/radix.js test/zen.js
scripts.testZEN: npm run clean && ZEN_TEST=1 mocha --exit test/zen/instance.js test/zen/secp256k1.js test/sea/sea.js
scripts.buildGUN: node lib/build.js gun && npm run minify
scripts.buildCompat: npm run buildSEA && npm run buildGUN
scripts.buildZEN: npm run buildPEN && node lib/build-zen.js && npm run minifyZEN
scripts.buildRelease: npm run buildCompat && npm run buildZEN
scripts.testRelease: npm run testPEN && npm run testZEN && npm test
scripts.verifyRelease: npm run buildRelease && npm run testRelease

author: Mark Nadal
